text:
is an Evangelion unit appearing in the Godzilla vs Evangelion collaboration.

Profile

The Beast form of Evangelion Unit-02 after injecting the G Cells G(odzilla) Cells: it is highly erosive and when incorporated into other living things, it alters the tissue of that living thing, so many monsters born under the influence of G Cells appear in the Godzilla series. into itself and the G Cells being activated. An orange dorsal fin grows from the back alongside the limiters, and the eyeball on the right side of the head is exposed, sharp teeth grow in the mouth, and the jaw opens wide up and down and it roars. When G cells are activated, it sources the Evangelion energy without any previous limitations. By using nuclear energy, it will pursue the enemy without control until it is completely annihilated. エヴァ2号機がビーストモードへ変化するとき、
G細胞が活性化し暴走
本体から橙色の背びれが生え、頭部右側の眼球は剥き出しとなる
さらに口には鋭い歯が生え、顎を上下に大きく開き咆哮する
G細胞が活性化するとエネルギー源が
核エネルギーとなり、活動限界はなくなる
敵を徹底的に殲滅するまで
暴走する 

History

Development

It was initially developed https://gigazine.net/news/20160724-gvse-wf2016s/ as a 30cm PVC figure developed by PLEX and TOHO announced on 30 August 2016 https://hobby.dengeki.com/news/254879/ for as February 2017 release. The setting of an Evangelion taken over by G Cells and mutating was the initial idea.
 https://web.archive.org/web/20160826024239/http://www.evastore.jp/pc/article/A6007501.html A renewal reprint with different colors was announced to on pre order on 27 October 2023. https://www.eva-info.jp/20689 

It was also featured as a playable unit in the mobile game Evangelion: Breaking Dawn.

On 23 December 2023, it was also featured as part of the [PC11] BS Premium Card Set Godzilla vs Evangelion in the Battle Spirits collaboration. http://en.battlespirits.com/product/p-cardset/pc11.php 

A deformed figure was released in the line DefoReal toy series developed by X-Plus named . Two versions were made: a regular version sold for 13,200 yen (Tax included) https://web.archive.org/web/20250110013740/https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gA6007509/ and one with shining eyes powered by batteries sold for 15,400 yen (Tax Included).
 https://web.archive.org/web/20250110014054/https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gA6007508-1/ 

A super deformed soft vinyl 4cm figure was made by PLEX and released on October 2025 as part of GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION Mini Sofvi Chronicle line, it also had a clear color with glitter variation.
